title: Bafuputsi ba tswang Yuropa ba Fumana Borwa ba Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: Explorers from Europe find southern Africa

meta.title: Bafuputsi ba tswang Yuropa ba Fumana Borwa ba Afrika

sources.title: Bartolomeu Dias reaches present Mossel Bay
Portuguese navigator Bartholomew Dias erects the first stone cross on the South African coast
Explorer and navigator Vasco da Gama completes his voyage round the Cape of Good Hope to India
Van Riebeeck lands at the Cape
Jan van Riebeeck, Dutch colonial administrator and first commander of the colony at the Cape of Good Hope, is born

slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 6 - Kgato e Bohareng
slides.title: Bafuputsi ba tswang Yuropa ba Fumana Borwa ba Afrika
slides.lead: Kamoo basesisi ba likepe ba Portugal le ba Netherlands ba fihlileng qetellong ya Afrika, le hore maeto a bona a malelele a ne a bolela eng ho batho ba neng ba se ba dutse mona.

media.alt: Sekepe sa lehong se sesang hodima maqhubu a matala a leoatle haufi le lebopo le letala la borwa ba Afrika, tlasa letsatsi le kganyang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 118 q40 -10 80 0 t80 0 t80 0 t80 0 v62 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><circle cx='262' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M40 118 L64 108 h96 l24 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='108' y='58' width='4' height='60' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M112 60 q40 8 0 46 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 60 q-38 8 0 46 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bula ka ho botsa baithuti hore na 'mofuputsi' ke eng le hore hobaneng batho ba mehleng ya kgale ba ne ba kena maoatleng ao ba neng ba sa a tsebe. Beha dikgopolo tse pedi tse kgolo tsa thuto: (1) basesisi ba likepe ba tswang Portugal, ha morao ba tswang Netherlands (Holland), ba ile ba fumana tsela ya leoatle e potolohang borwa ba Afrika, mme (2) ho fihla ha bona ho ile ha fetola bophelo ba Khoikhoi le San ba neng ba se ba dutse mona. Hopotsa baithuti hore ho 'fumana' sebaka ha ho bolele hore se ne se se na batho - batho ba ne ba dutse mona ka dilemo tse dikete.

slides.title: Hobaneng MaYuropa a ne a batla ho sesa ho ya borwa?
slides.lead: Ba ne ba batla tsela ya leoatle e isang khoebong e nonneng ya Bochabela.

blocks.text: Kgalekgale, dinoko tse kang pepere le sinamone, hammoho le silika le kgauta, di ne di tla Yuropa di etswa India le Bochabela. Di ne di tsamaya butle hodima naha, kahoo di ne di **turu haholo**.

items: Marena a Yuropa a ne a batla tsela e potlakileng le e theko e tlase ya ho fihla Bochabela ka leoatle.
Batho ba **Portugal** ba ile ba etsa qeto ya ho sesa ho ya borwa ho pota lebopo la Afrika ho fumana tsela eo.
Ho ne ho se motho Yuropa ya neng a tseba hore na likepe di ka kgona ho pota tlase ho Afrika.

media.alt: Mekotlana e menyenyane le dipitsa tsa dinoko di ena le dichelete pela tsona, di bontsha thepa ya khoebo ya bohlokwa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q10 -46 30 -46 q20 0 30 46 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><path d='M96 120 q9 -40 26 -40 q17 0 26 40 Z' fill='#b5732f'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='76' rx='18' ry='6' fill='#5c3a17'/><ellipse cx='122' cy='82' rx='16' ry='6' fill='#7a4a1f'/><circle cx='168' cy='104' r='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='184' cy='112' r='12' fill='#d18f2c'/><circle cx='176' cy='94' r='10' fill='#f0b24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Boloka sena se le pepeneneng: lebaka la maeto ana a kotsi e ne e le chelete le khoebo. Dinoko di ne di sebediswa ho tswakanya le ho boloka dijo, mme di ne di theko e phahameng. Hlalosa hore ka nako ena MaYuropa a ne a tlameha ho reka thepa ya Bochabela ka bahwebi ba bangata, e leng se neng se etsa hore e be theko e phahameng - tsela e otlolohileng ya leoatle e ne e tla dumella Portugal ho iketsetsa khoebo. O se ke wa imetsa baithuti ka mabitso hona jwale; bafuputsi ba tla ho latela.

slides.title: Batho ba neng ba se ba dutse mona
slides.lead: Borwa ba Afrika e ne e le lehae la Khoikhoi le San pele ho sekepe le seng sa MaYuropa se fihla.

blocks.text: **San** e ne e le batsomi-le-bafuni ba neng ba tsoma diphoofolo mme ba fune dimela. **Khoikhoi** ba ne ba boloka mehlape ya dikgomo le dinku mme ba fallela moo ho nang le jwang bo botjha le metsi. Hammoho hangata ba bitswa **Khoisan**.

items: Ba ne ba dutse borwa ba Afrika ka dilemo tse dikete.
Khoikhoi ba haufi le lebopo ba ile ba kopana le basesisi ba pele ba MaYuropa difahleho ka difahleho.
Naha ena e ne e le lehae la bona - e ne e se e se na batho kapa e emetse ho 'fumanwa'.

media.alt: Dikgomo tse pedi di fula mobung o motala haufi le ntlwana ya jwang e chitja, di bontsha balisa ba Khoikhoi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M30 108 q26 -30 52 0 Z' fill='#c8a25a'/><path d='M40 108 v-12 h4 v12 Z' fill='#8a6a34'/><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='150' cy='96' rx='22' ry='12'/><rect x='134' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='160' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M130 90 q-6 -6 -2 -10' stroke='#5c3a1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='196' cy='104' rx='16' ry='9'/><rect x='185' y='104' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='203' y='104' width='3' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Selaete sena se bohlokwa bakeng sa histori e nepahetseng le e lokileng. Hlakisa hore batho ba ne ba dutse mona nako e telele ka mekgwa ya bona ya bophelo. Fapanya ka bonolo: San e ne e le batsomi-le-bafuni, Khoikhoi e ne e le balisa ba nang le dikgomo le dinku. Lentswe 'fumana' kapa 'sibolla' le sebediswa ho ya ka pono ya MaYuropa; Khoisan ba ne ba se ba tseba naha ena e le lehae. Sena se hlophisetsa 'kopano ya pele' hamorao.

slides.title: Portugal e etella pele
slides.lead: Mohato ka mohato, basesisi ba Portugal ba ile ba etsa dimmapa tsa lebopo le bophirimela la Afrika.

blocks.text: Basesisi ba tswang **Portugal** ha ba a ka ba sesa tsela yohle ka nako e le nngwe. Leetong le leng le le leng ba ne ba ya pele hanyane ho ya borwa ho theosa le lebopo la Afrika mme ba kgutlela hae ho tlo arolelana seo ba ithutileng sona.

items: Ba ne ba sesa ka likepe tse matla tsa lehong tse bitswang **dikaravele** (caravels) tse neng di kgona ho sesa kgahlano le moya.
Molaodi ka mong o ne a eketsa lebopo le letjha dimmapeng tsa Portugal.
Sepheo sa bona e ne e ntse e le ho fumana pheletso ya Afrika le ho tswela pele ho ya Bochabela.

media.alt: Sekepe sa karavele se nang le dikota tse tharo le maseile a masweu a tletseng leoatleng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='220' height='42' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M46 118 L70 106 h84 l22 12 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'><line x1='78' y1='40' x2='78' y2='106'/><line x1='112' y1='30' x2='112' y2='106'/><line x1='146' y1='44' x2='146' y2='106'/></g><path d='M80 44 q26 6 0 40 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M114 34 q30 8 0 48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M148 48 q22 6 0 36 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='16' height='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlalosa hore ho fuputsa e ne e le tshebetso e butle, e hlokolosi, mohato ka mohato ka dilemo tse ngata, e seng leeto le le leng feela. Hlahisa karavele: sekepe se bobebe, se lebelo se neng se kgona ho sesa kgahlano le moya, se neng se etsa hore maeto a maleleletsa a leoatle a kgonehe. Boloka mabitso a le manyenyane mona - balaodi ba babedi ba tummeng (Dias le da Gama) ba fumana diselaete tsa bona ho latela.

slides.eyebrow: Ba ne ba sa lahlehe jwang?
slides.title: Ho fumana tsela leoatleng
slides.lead: Ba se na dimmapa tsa leoatle le bulehileng, basesisi ba ne ba sebedisa letsatsi, dinaledi le disebediswa tse bonolo.

blocks.text: Hole leoatleng ha ho na ditsela kapa matshwao a tsela. Bafuputsi ba ne ba sebedisa **khampasi** (compass) ho fumana leboya, mme ba shebella **letsatsi le dinaledi** ho hlwaya moo ba leng teng.

items: Sesebediswa se bitswang **astrolabe** se ne se thusa ho lekanya bophahamo ba letsatsi kapa naledi lehodimong.
MaPortugal a ne a hloma difapano tse kgolo tsa lejwe, tse bitswang **padrao**, lebopong ho tshwaya kamoo ba fihlileng teng.
Maeto a ne a le kotsi - difefo, tlala le maloetse di ne di ka otla ba le hole le hae.

media.alt: Khampasi e chitja e bontshang leboya, haufi le sefapano se selelele sa lejwe se hlomilweng lebopong.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='72' cy='80' r='40' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M72 46 L82 80 L72 114 L62 80 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M72 80 L82 80' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'/><text x='72' y='40' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3f26'>N</text><rect x='150' y='40' width='10' height='84' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='134' y='58' width='42' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='128' y='120' width='54' height='14' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sena ke selaete se kenyeletsang matsoho, se kgahlisang - baithuti ba Kereiti ya 6 ba rata 'kamoo'. Hlalosa ka bonolo hore nale ya khampasi kamehla e supa leboya, le hore bophahamo ba letsatsi kapa dinaledi bo ne bo bolella basesisi hore na ba hole hokae ka leboya kapa borwa. Hlahisa 'padrao' (sefapano sa lejwe) hobane Dias o ile a hloma se seng mme se hlaha selaeteng se latelang. Hatisa kotsi ya nnete ho aha tlhompho bakeng sa kamoo maeto ana a neng a le thata.

slides.title: Bartolomeu Dias o Potoloha Cape
slides.lead: Ka 1488 molaodi wa Portugal e ile ya eba MoYuropa wa pele ya tsejwang ho sesa a potoloha ntlha ya Afrika.

blocks.text: **Bartolomeu Dias** o ile a sesa a ya borwa hoo sefefo se ileng sa foka likepe tsa hae ho potoloha tlase ho Afrika a sa ka a bona naha. O ne a potolohile **Cape**, a paka hore likepe di ka fihla Bochabela ka leoatle.

items: O ile a fihla Mossel Bay mme a hloma sefapano sa lejwe lebopong.
Qalong o ile a bitsa ntlha ena 'Cape of Storms' (Ntlha ya Difefo) ka lebaka la boemo ba leholimo bo hlaha.
Morena wa Portugal o ile a e reha lebitso le letjha la **Cape of Good Hope**, hobane jwale ho ne ho ena le tshepo ya ho fihla India.

media.alt: Sekepe se sunngwa ke moya o matla le maqhubu ho potoloha ntlha e nang le mafika, ho ena le sefapano sa lejwe hodima lebopo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='50' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 110 q30 -14 60 0 t60 0 t60 0 t60 0 v50 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><path d='M150 110 q40 -30 90 -20 v20 Z' fill='#6b6152'/><rect x='196' y='58' width='7' height='34' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='186' y='68' width='27' height='7' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M48 108 L68 98 h44 l16 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><line x1='84' y1='60' x2='84' y2='98' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M86 62 q30 8 0 34 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q30 8 60 2' stroke='#9aa77f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lena ke le leng la maeto a mabedi a bohlokwa a thuto. Hatisa 1488 le kgopolo ya 'wa pele' ho ya ka tlaleho ya MaYuropa. Pheta pale ka bonolo: sefefo se ile sa isa Dias ho potoloha Cape hoo e batlang e le ka phoso, e leng se ileng sa paka hore tsela ya leoatle e ne e kgoneha. Phetoho ya lebitso ho tswa 'Cape of Storms' ho ya 'Cape of Good Hope' ke ntlha e hopolehang - botsa baithuti hore hobaneng 'good hope' (tshepo e ntle) e ne e le lebitso le letle. [SME] Ka kopo netefatsa mantswe a hore Dias o fihlile Mossel Bay le ho rehwa ha Cape kgahlano le sengolwa sa SAHO pele ho tlhahiso.

slides.title: Vasco da Gama o fihla India
slides.lead: Hoo e ka bang dilemo tse leshome hamorao, molaodi e mong wa Portugal o ile a sesa tsela yohle ho ya India le ho kgutla.

blocks.text: **Vasco da Gama** o ile a tloha ka 1497. Likepe tsa hae di ile tsa emisa ho theosa le lebopo la borwa ba Afrika bakeng sa metsi a foreshe le phomolo, yaba di sesa ho nyolosa lebopo la bochabela le ho tshelela **India**, eo a fihlileng ho yona ka 1498.

items: O ile a reha lebopo la bochabela **Natal**, hobane o ile a se feta haufi le Keresemese.
O ile a bula tsela yohle ya leoatle ho tswa Yuropa ho ya Bochabela.
Jwale likepe tsa Portugal di ne di feta Cape khafetsa ha di ya khoebong.

media.alt: Mmapa o bonolo o bontshang tsela ya ho sesa e nang le matheba ho tswa Yuropa ho theosa ho pota Afrika ho ya India.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M70 20 q-16 40 8 70 q18 22 0 46 q-6 12 14 12 q26 0 30 -22' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 24 q22 30 6 66 q-10 22 8 40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 26 C40 60 70 96 78 120 C82 138 120 138 150 120' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><circle cx='60' cy='26' r='5' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='60' y='16' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>Portugal</text><text x='176' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>India</text></svg>

slides.notes: Leeto la bobedi la bohlokwa. Da Gama o ile a qeta seo Dias a se qadileng: tsela e bulehileng ya leoatle ho ya fihla India. Bontsha mmapeng kamoo tsela e haufi le lebopo la Afrika mme e potoloha Cape. Hlalosa hore 'Natal' e amana le tswalo/Keresemese, ke ka hoo a ileng a e sebedisa haufi le la 25 Tshitwe. Kamora sena, Cape e ile ya eba sebaka se tlwaelehileng sa ho emisa bakeng sa likepe tse fetang - se isang ho MaDutch. [SME] Netefatsa ho rehwa ha Natal le ditsatsi tsa 1497-1498 kgahlano le SAHO pele ho tlhahiso.

slides.title: Ho kopana Cape
slides.lead: Ha basesisi le Khoikhoi ba kopana, ho ne ho ena le khoebo mme, ka dinako tse ding, dikgohlano.

blocks.text: Likepe tse fetang di ne di hloka metsi a foreshe, nama le phomolo. Basesisi ka nako tse ding ba ne ba **hwebisana** tshepe le dikgetla le Khoikhoi bakeng sa dikgomo le dinku. Empa mahlakore a mabedi a ne a sa arolelane puo, mme ho se utlwane ho ne ho ka fetoha kotsi.

items: Khoebo e ile ya thusa basesisi ba kgathetseng ho fumana dijo tse foreshe bakeng sa leeto le lelelele.
Ka 1510 ho ile ha qhoma ntwa Table Bay mme moetapele wa Portugal le banna ba bangata ba hae ba bolawa.
Ka dilemo tse ngata kamora moo, boholo ba likepe tsa Portugal di ile tsa kgetha ho se emise Cape.

media.alt: Dihlopha tse pedi tsa batho di shebane lebopong, se seng se le pela seketswana, ba fapanyetsana thepa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='100' width='240' height='18' fill='#3a6b8a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='70' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='98' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='91' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='160' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='153' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='188' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='181' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='86' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M206 100 q16 -6 30 0 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#5c3f26'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sebetsana le sena ka bohlale le ka nnete boemong ba Kereiti ya 6. Kopano e ne e ena le mahlakore a mabedi: khoebo ya kgotso LE dikgohlano. Ntwa ya 1510 Table Bay (eo ho yona Motlatsi wa 'Musi wa Portugal Francisco de Almeida le banna ba bangata ba shweleng) ke lebaka leo MaPortugal a ileng a qoba Cape kamora moo. Qoba ho beha molato ho lehlakore le le leng; hlalosa hore ho hloka puo e tshwanang le meetlo e fapaneng ho ile ha etsa hore tshepo e be thata. [SME] Ka kopo netefatsa ketsahalo ya 1510 Table Bay, boitsebiso ba moetapele, le mantswe a mabapi le bashweleng pele ho tlhahiso - a boloke a lokela dilemo.

slides.title: MaDutch le VOC
slides.lead: Dilemo tse fetang lekgolo hamorao, bahwebi ba tswang Netherlands ba ne ba hloka sebaka sa ho emisa bohareng ba leeto le eang Bochabela.

blocks.text: **Dutch East India Company**, e tsejwang ka ditlhaku tsa Sedutch **VOC**, e ile ya romela likepe tse ngata pakeng tsa Yuropa le Bochabela. Cape e ne e le hantle bohareng ba leeto leo le lelelele.

items: Basesisi ba maeto a maleleletsa hangata ba ne ba kula ba se na dijo tse foreshe le metsi.
VOC e ne e batla **seteishene sa ho phumula** (refreshment station) Cape ho lema meroho le ho fumana nama e foreshe.
Kahoo Company e ile ya etsa qeto ya ho romela batho ho tlo aha setsi Table Bay.

media.alt: Folaga ya sekepe sa khoebo pela mabokose le dikgohlopo, di bontsha setsi sa khoebo sa company.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='6' height='100' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M46 32 h60 v34 h-60 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='76' y='55' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c1414'>VOC</text><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='120' y='96' width='36' height='34'/><rect x='158' y='104' width='30' height='26'/></g><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'><line x1='120' y1='113' x2='156' y2='113'/><line x1='138' y1='96' x2='138' y2='130'/></g><ellipse cx='176' cy='104' rx='15' ry='6' fill='#8a6a34'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlolela ho tswa ho MaPortugal ho ya ho MaDutch. Hatisa lebaka: VOC e ne e le company e kgolo ya khoebo eo likepe tsa yona di neng di nka dikgwedi ho fihla Bochabela, mme basesisi ba ne ba kula (hangata ka lebaka la scurvy, ho hloka dijo tse foreshe). Seteishene sa 'ho phumula' bohareng Cape se ne se tla fana ka meroho e foreshe, metsi le nama. Lena ke lebaka leo MaDutch a ileng a tla - khoebo le phepelo, e seng qalong ho aha naha.

slides.title: Jan van Riebeeck Cape
slides.lead: Ka 1652 VOC e ile ya romela Jan van Riebeeck ho tlo hloma seteishene sa ho phumula.

blocks.text: **Jan van Riebeeck** o ile a fihla Table Bay ka Mmesa 1652 le sehlopha se senyenyane sa batho. Ba ile ba aha qhobosheane bakeng sa polokeho mme ba lema serapa se seholo sa meroho ho fepa likepe tse fetang.

items: Ba ne ba lema meroho le ditholwana mme ba boloka diphoofolo bakeng sa nama e foreshe.
Ba ne ba hwebisana le Khoikhoi bakeng sa dikgomo le dinku.
Seteishene sena se senyenyane se ile sa hola butle - sa fetoha qalo ya bodulo bo sa feleng ba MaYuropa.

media.alt: Qhobosheane e bopehileng jwaloka naledi pela mela e hlophisitsweng ya serapa sa meroho tlasa thaba e nang le hlooho e bataletseng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 60 h120 l16 -22 h44 v42 H20 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='3'><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='150' y2='108'/><line x1='30' y1='122' x2='150' y2='122'/><line x1='30' y1='136' x2='150' y2='136'/></g><path d='M176 104 l14 -8 l14 8 l-4 22 h-20 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a34' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='186' y='114' width='8' height='12' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lena ke sebaka sa phetoho karolong ya bobedi ya thuto. Van Riebeeck o ile a fihla ka Mmesa 1652 le batho ba ka bang mashome a robong; ba ile ba aha qhobosheane le Serapa sa Company ho fepa likepe. Hatisa poleloana 'bodulo bo sa feleng' - ho fapana le MaPortugal a neng a emisa feela, MaDutch a ile a dula. Ho dula hona ke hona ho etsang hore 1652 e be bohlokwa hakaalo mme ho isa ho diphello selaeteng se latelang. [SME] Netefatsa kgwedi ya ho fihla le boholo bo ka bang teng ba sehlopha sa van Riebeeck (hangata bo fanwa e le hoo e ka bang 90) pele ho tlhahiso.

slides.eyebrow: Se ne se bolela eng ho Khoikhoi
slides.title: Phetoho ho batho ba Cape
slides.lead: Bodulo bo botjha butle butle bo ile ba nka naha le mafulo ao Khoikhoi ba neng ba itshetlehile ho ona.

blocks.text: Qalong MaDutch le Khoikhoi ba ne ba hwebisana. Empa ha bodulo bo ntse bo hola, MaDutch a ne a batla **naha e eketsehileng** bakeng sa mapolasi - naha e tshwanang eo Khoikhoi ba neng ba e sebedisa ho fudisa dikgomo tsa bona.

items: Khoikhoi ba ile ba lahlehelwa ke mafulo mme, ha nako e ntse e ya, dikgomo tsa bona tse ngata.
Dikgohlano tsa naha le dikgomo di ile tsa lebisa ntweng pakeng tsa mahlakore a mabedi.
Bophelo ba Khoikhoi le San bo ile ba fetoha ka ho sa feleng ka lebaka la bodulo Cape.

media.alt: Mola wa terata o arolang naha e talantalane ya mafulo, dikgomo di le lehlakoreng le leng le ntlo ya polasi lehlakoreng le leng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#6b6152' stroke-width='3'><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='150'/><line x1='104' y1='84' x2='136' y2='84'/><line x1='104' y1='104' x2='136' y2='104'/></g><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='56' cy='112' rx='18' ry='9'/><rect x='44' y='112' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='66' y='112' width='3' height='12'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='168' y='96' width='40' height='30'/></g><path d='M166 96 l22 -16 l22 16 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Fana ka phello e kgolo ka ho hlaka le ka toka. Kamano e qadile ka khoebo empa ya fetoha ha bajaki ba batla naha ya mapolasi - mafulo ao Khoikhoi ba neng ba a hloka bakeng sa mehlape ya bona. Sena se ile sa lebisa tahlehong ya naha, tahlehong ya dikgomo, le dikgohlano. Boloka e le nnete mme e lokela dilemo; ntlha ke hore ho fihla ha bodulo ho fetotse bophelo ba Khoikhoi le San ka ho sa feleng. Sena se hokahana le dihlooho tse latelang tsa CAPS mabapi le bokoloni ba Cape.

slides.title: Ditsatsi tsa bohlokwa: 1488 ho isa 1652

blocks.alt: Timeline ho tloha 1488 ho isa 1652 e bontshang Dias a potoloha Cape, da Gama a fihla India, ntwa ya 1510 Table Bay, le van Riebeeck a fihla ka 1652.

events.label: Vasco da Gama o tswela pele ho ya India
Likepe tsa Dutch VOC di feta Cape khafetsa
Van Riebeeck o qala seteishene sa ho phumula

slides.notes: Sebedisa selaete sena ho thusa baithuti ho beha diketsahalo ka tatellano, tsebo ya bohlokwa ya CAPS Intermediate Phase. Ba kope ho hlokomela sekgeo se selelele pakeng tsa maeto a pele a Portugal (bofelong ba 1400s) le bodulo ba Dutch (1652) - dilemo tse fetang 150. MaPortugal a fumane le ho sebedisa tsela ya leoatle; MaDutch ke ona a qetellong a ileng a dula Cape.

slides.title: Mahlakore a mabedi a pale e le nngwe
slides.lead: Maeto a tshwanang a shebahala a fapane haholo ho ya ka hore o mang.

items: Tsela ya leoatle e isang maruong a Bochabela e ile ya bulwa.
Khoebo le likepe di ile tsa hola, mme Cape ya eba sebaka sa bohlokwa sa ho emisa.
MaDutch a ile a aha setsi se tsitsitseng qetellong ya Afrika.
Basele ba ile ba fihla naheng e neng e se e le lehae la bona.
Ba ile ba lahlehelwa ke mafulo le dikgomo ha bodulo bo ntse bo hola.
Mokgwa wa bona wa bophelo o ile wa fetoha ka ho sa feleng.

slides.notes: Lena ke selaete sa ho nahana. Ruta 'pono' - histori e tshwanang e utlwahala e le katleho e kgahlisang lehlakoreng la Yuropa mme e le tahleho lehlakoreng la Khoisan. Kgothaletsa baithuti ho tshwara dinnete tsena tse pedi ka nako e le nngwe. Sena se etsa mohlala wa monahano o leka-lekaneng wa histori mme se ba lokisetsa dipotso tsa tlhahlobo.

slides.title: Seo re ithutileng sona
slides.lead: Basesisi ba Portugal ba ile ba fumana tsela ya leoatle e potolohang borwa ba Afrika, mme MaDutch hamorao a dula Cape - a fetola bophelo ba Khoisan.

blocks.text: Hopola pale: MaYuropa a ne a batla tsela ya leoatle e eang Bochabela; **Dias** o ile a potoloha Cape ka 1488 mme **da Gama** a fihla India ka 1498; mme ka **1652 van Riebeeck** o ile a aha seteishene sa ho phumula se ileng sa hola ho ba bodulo bo tsitsitseng.

blocks.question: Hobaneng MaPortugal a ne a batla ho sesa ho potoloha ntlha ya Afrika?
Bolela bafuputsi ba babedi ba tummeng ba Portugal thutong ena mme o bolele hore e mong le e mong o entse eng.
Ho fihla ha bodulo ba MaDutch Cape ho ile ha fetola jwang bophelo ba Khoikhoi?

slides.notes: Qetella ka ho boela ho hlahloba dinako tse tharo tsa bohlokwa: Dias (1488), da Gama (1497-98) le van Riebeeck (1652). Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo e le mosebetsi o ngotsweng kapa puisano ya tlelase; matshwao a latela setaele sa CAPS. Potso ya ho qetela e hlahloba hore baithuti ba kgona ho hlalosa phello, e seng ho hopola feela taba. Bontsha karolo e latelang: bokoloni ba Cape lekgolong la bo17 le la bo18 la dilemo.
